requires.rationale: policy carries resource-level predicate, not flat role check

structure.description: Policy form composes (actorFilter, resourceFilter, permission-set). Resource filter is a predicate over entity attributes (domain=X AND tag=Y AND platform=Z). Policy preview shows N matching entities live.

rationale.hypothesis: Flat role-based access (admin/editor/reader) cannot express 'editors of finance domain only'. Conditional resource filters scale governance without proliferating roles.

evidence.description: Policies with resourceFilter + actorFilter + permission list
Policies with Resource and Condition predicates

counterexample.description: With 5 users and 1 resource type, flat roles suffice
